products.name: Carbon Block Filter
products.description: Our carbon block filter is the product of advanced technology and years of research and development. We use a unique blend of activated carbon and sintering coconut shell, which allows us to create a filter with unparalleled performance. Our filter is able to remove a wide range of impurities, including chlorine, VOCs, and other harmful chemicals.

specs.Material: Activated carbon and sintering coconut shell

products.name: Industrial PP Filter (SOE/DOE)
products.description: Industrial PP Filters come in sizes ranging from 10″ to 50″, offering flexibility for diverse applications and ensuring a perfect fit. The micro-groove, deep-groove, or smooth surface options optimize filtration performance.

specs.End Cap: 222 Flat and Fin end Nitrile O-Ring caps

products.name: Silicon Ring Seal Connection UDF
products.description: Silicon Ring Seal Connection UDF filter is easy to install and easy to do maintenance. Both sides end cap can be chosen for different colors.

products.name: Big Blue UDF Filter
products.description: Big Blue UDF Filter has FLAT END CAP available only and Outer Shell can be customized.

products.name: T33 coconut shell activated carbon filter
products.description: High-quality filtration that effectively removes impurities like chlorine, VOCs, and other harmful contaminants. Coconut shell carbon filter provides better taste and odor.

products.name: FLAT CAP PCO FILTER CARBON BLOCK
products.description: Advanced carbon block technology that removes impurities like chlorine and sediment. A unique photocatalytic oxidation process that eliminates harmful bacteria and viruses.

products.name: Inline Water Filter For Home
products.description: Our filter uses a combination of activated carbon and sediment filter to remove chlorine, lead, and other impurities from your water. Simply attach the filter to your water line.

products.name: Mineralized Small T33 Inline Water Filter
products.description: Improves taste and odor by removing chlorine and other contaminants. Adds beneficial minerals to water for improved health and hydration.

products.name: WALL MOUNTED PIPELINE WATER DISPENSER
products.description: Wall-mounted pipeline water dispenser has 5 stages of water volume 150ML to 850ML, and 5 levels of water temperature 25C to 100C. Hot water in 3 seconds.
